A '''skirmish on Eriadu''' occurred after the [[Cleansing of New Plympto|Battle of New Plympto]]. After [[Bultar Swan/Legends|Bultar Swan]] and [[Tsui Choi/Legends|Tsui Choi]] survived [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], they retreated to [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]]. [[Clone stormtrooper]]s were on the alert and searched the planet for any signs of the hiding [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].

Led by their [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone trooper commander]], a patrol squad scouted the slums of an Eriadu city for the hiding Jedi. [[Tsui Choi/Legends|Tsui Choi]], after ditching his [[Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor/Legends|starfighter]] in the area, jumped off a rooftop and slaughtered the team. The two Jedi then met and retreated to [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]].

==Appearances==
